74468.subject: SpaceX Trades, xStocks Fails to Deliver
74468.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

These are the biggest Web3 news today:

* **[SpaceX](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/spacex-begins-nasdaq-trading-with-tokenized-versions-mirroring-largest-ipo-in-history)**[ opens at $1.77T with tokenized mirrors live](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/spacex-begins-nasdaq-trading-with-tokenized-versions-mirroring-largest-ipo-in-history)

* **[xStocks](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/bybit-binance-bitget-cancel-tokenized-spacex-allocations-xstocks-fails-deliver-shares)**[ fails to deliver shares](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/bybit-binance-bitget-cancel-tokenized-spacex-allocations-xstocks-fails-deliver-shares)

* **[Coinbase](https://thedefiant.io/converge/cefi/coinbase-gold-silver-futures-24-7-trading-us-regulated-oil)**[ launches US-regulated gold and silver futures 24/7](https://thedefiant.io/converge/cefi/coinbase-gold-silver-futures-24-7-trading-us-regulated-oil)

* **[Japan](https://thedefiant.io/converge/regulation/japan-lower-house-crypto-fiea-bill-etf-20-percent-tax)**[ votes to regulate crypto](https://thedefiant.io/converge/regulation/japan-lower-house-crypto-fiea-bill-etf-20-percent-tax)

* **[DeFi](https://thedefiant.io/news/hacks/q2-2026-most-hacked-quarter-defi-70-exploits-746m)**[ logs ~70 Q2 exploits](https://thedefiant.io/news/hacks/q2-2026-most-hacked-quarter-defi-70-exploits-746m)

SpaceX [opened for trading on Nasdaq Friday under ticker SPCX](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/spacex-begins-nasdaq-trading-with-tokenized-versions-mirroring-largest-ipo-in-history), priced at $135 per share and raising $75 billion pre-greenshoe — the largest IPO in history, per Nasdaq and Morgan Stanley. The [tokenized stack that assembled around the listing this week](https://thedefiant.io/newsletter/spacex-goes-public-with-a-live-crypto-tokenized-stack) traded alongside it from the opening bell: Ondo's SPCXon, Backpack's SPCX on Solana, xStocks' SPCXx on decentralized exchanges, Dinari's dShare on Hyperliquid's HyperCore, and pre-IPO perps that converted to tracking the live print.

The one route that broke ran through a middleman. Binance, Bybit and Bitget [canceled their tokenized allocation campaigns and refunded subscribers in full](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/bybit-binance-bitget-cancel-tokenized-spacex-allocations-xstocks-fails-deliver-shares) after xStocks, the tokenized-equity provider that had agreed to source shares for the exchanges, failed to procure them — $557 million unwound at Binance alone. Every product that held the asset onchain or through a broker-dealer delivered. 

Within the same news cycle, Coinbase [took its US-regulated gold and silver futures to 24/7 trading](https://thedefiant.io/converge/cefi/coinbase-gold-silver-futures-24-7-trading-us-regulated-oil), and Japan's lower house [voted to move crypto under its securities law](https://thedefiant.io/converge/regulation/japan-lower-house-crypto-fiea-bill-etf-20-percent-tax). The risk ledger is keeping pace — Q2 [logged a r

74461.subject: SpaceX Begins Trading After the Biggest IPO Ever
74461.body:
Daily Pre-IPO Briefing

StartEngine Private (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VW-Mww2K4MQhW3Msc-X6MYdk-W7lBRbf5Qc8XZN78LwtH3lcq-W6N1vHY6lZ3p1W2VRbdf3Q0D8gW58ph7d2L5Q_qW4lXqQ53bJ2yXW4LV9Mc173fssVHR83G4KHnFHW8ylqPP94zvdsW8561qx7Z24mjW14WYRt3sGstXW5vFJ-M4RYbNjVFX0QG1sX-qGW118Ysq4qHh_4W4l95Mv16qxx9W6T7yXF4hFqC4W1y_p7L8df9R3W6mCyQ32Th1NGW9bNM3B4Pjd4tW5Jxft52Wm76JN9gYc017BrZnW1Ty4Gc98pB8pW1kcfx2225RBFW1BzZp_1TgYJWN58qQxcg6MQPf7CgWyY04 )

SpaceX Begins Trading (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VW-Mww2K4MQhW3Msc-X6MYdk-W7lBRbf5Qc8XZN78LwtH3lcq-W6N1vHY6lZ3p1W2VRbdf3Q0D8gW58ph7d2L5Q_qW4lXqQ53bJ2yXW4LV9Mc173fssVHR83G4KHnFHW8ylqPP94zvdsW8561qx7Z24mjW14WYRt3sGstXW5vFJ-M4RYbNjVFX0QG1sX-qGW118Ysq4qHh_4W4l95Mv16qxx9W6T7yXF4hFqC4W1y_p7L8df9R3W6mCyQ32Th1NGW9bNM3B4Pjd4tW5Jxft52Wm76JN9gYc017BrZnW1Ty4Gc98pB8pW1kcfx2225RBFW1BzZp_1TgYJWN58qQxcg6MQPf7CgWyY04 )

Hi Oleg,

There was only one story we could pick for our latest Pre-IPO Briefing.

SpaceX officially debuted on the stock market with the largest IPO ever. The company set its final IPO price at $135 on Thursday, raising $75 billion at a $1.77 trillion valuation.¹

The deal makes SpaceX the seventh most-valuable U.S. company, ahead of Tesla.¹

Enthusiasm continued after Elon Musk and Gwynne Shotwell rang the opening bell.

Just after shares opened, stock topped $160, pushing SpaceX above a $2 trillion market cap. As of early afternoon on Friday, the high price for the day was $176.52.¹

This IPO does not imply specific returns for investors with exposure to SpaceX through offerings on StartEngine Private. Past performance is not indicative of future results.

Many of the largest private companies spend years building value before ever reaching Wall Street. By the time an IPO happens, a significant portion of the growth story is already behind them.

That’s exactly why we launched StartEngine Private (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VW-Mww2K4MQhW3Msc-X6MYdk-W7lBRbf5Qc8XZN78LwtH3lcq-W6N1vHY6lZ3p1W2VRbdf3Q0D8gW58ph7d2L5Q_qW4lXqQ53bJ2yXW4LV9Mc173fssVHR83G4KHnFHW8ylqPP94zvdsW8561qx7Z24mjW14WYRt3sGstXW5vFJ-M4RYbNjVFX0QG1sX-qGW118Ysq4qHh_4W4l95Mv16qxx9W6T7yXF4hFqC4W1y_p7L8df9R3W6mCyQ32Th1NGW9bNM3B4Pjd4tW5Jxft52Wm76JN9gYc017BrZnW1Ty4Gc98pB8pW1kcfx2225RBFW1BzZp_1TgYJWN58qQxcg6MQPf7CgWyY04 ) : to help accredited investors access opportunities that were once largely reserved for VC firms, institutions, and industry insiders.

SpaceX's IPO underscores why so many investors are paying closer attention to the private markets.

Ready to start or grow your pre-IPO portfolio? Connect with our team to discuss your investing goals, or explore current offerings.

Explore Opportunities
(https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VW-Mww2K4MQhW3Msc-X6MYdk-W7lBRbf5Qc8XZN78LwtH3lcq-W6N1vHY6lZ3p1W2VRbdf3Q0D8gW58ph7d2L5Q_qW4lXqQ53bJ2yXW4LV9Mc173fssVHR83G4KHnFHW8ylqPP94zvdsW8561qx7Z24mjW14WYRt3sGstXW5vFJ-M4RYbNjVFX0QG1sX-q

74460.subject: Onchain Assets Weekly: 6/12/26
74460.body:
Onchain Assets Weekly

Автор: Securitize


Автор: Securitize

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/onchain-assets-weekly-61226-securitize-z28oc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BMaP4eLmiQ0S6SUaeIVhu6A%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1W8tROVr6L0sk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqbcnom6~3c-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqbcnom6-3c
  
This week’s highlights: Securitize CEO discusses IPO plans on Bloomberg; Securitize recognized by Fortune Crypto 100; Tokenized stocks could unlock $5T crypto market; and Securitize President on tokenization. Securitize CEO Carlos Domingo on Advancing IPO Plans | Bloomberg Securitize CEO Carlos Domingo says SPAC proceeds could help Securitize expand liquidity services and position the company for industry consolidation. WATCH NOW Fortune Crypto 100 Names Securitize a Top Crypto Services Company | Fortune Fortune named Securitize a top 10 Crypto Services company in its Fortune Crypto 100, the definitive ranking of the most influential companies in blockchain. READ MORE Securitize CEO Says Tokenized Stocks Could Unlock a $5T Crypto Market | CoinDesk At ETHConf, Carlos Domingo said moving stocks and ETFs onchain could open the door to a market much larger than today’s roughly $30B tokenized asset sector. READ MORE Are Tokenized Stocks the Next Big Catalyst? With Brett Redfearn | Talking Tokenization Podcast Securitize President Brett Redfearn traces tokenization’s shift from disruption to integration, with tokenized stocks, regulatory innovation, and onchain IPO access emerging as key themes. WATCH NOW
Приєднатися до обговорення
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/onchain-assets-weekly-61226-securitize-z28oc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BMaP4eLmiQ0S6SUaeIVhu6A%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1W8tROVr6L0sk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_-null-fz96fz~mqbcnom6~3c-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqbcnom6-3c
  
      

----------------------------------------

Це повідомлення е-поштою адресовано учасникові Oleh Novosadov (I am 36 years old, and I am passionate about the world of cryptocurrencies and blockchain technologies. My professional interests include investing in cryptocurrencies, exploring blockchain, Web3, and the DeFi sector.)

74458.subject: SambaNova’s SN50 Chip Could Be Faster Than NVIDIA’s Blackwell B200 GPU
74458.body:
Series Sambanova-QP-1 offers exposure to a company taking aim at NVIDIA

Sambanova New Launch (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VVRF_V52lWlkW1sr4rm6bnNPsW5QKV2t5Qc5sZN1qZLsv3pyd0W8wLKSR6lZ3n3W8xBsYq6Gm342W84vklZ9dCkHCW5X56n21SyPC5W3xBhZD7CYjxFVkcmWD1L6rkzW1w96sL1X8lzyW4mLTjR5ScPZbW7lsV5S3HJQ5SW94Tq9K6wGRHzW8rQWmJ7FtphhN5CvrgdhClkLN31Nm4b_vpvVW6VvM024fpSW5W5NcWCr8lBRVKN9hGH5BDrLbYVH-Lgc83wFmGW3zpldH6dcbjKN1KR69rzm2cqW4gMSmf3ryfP8W2vBjKX571lVzV1fqW36yyGrJW25spVW4mvjkWW2H3xQw8PwQFsW1rVFt68R0WpfW5bTD9_27bfqpW8HK9C16MhDQvW8FQWLg8RvfdbW1PxT_c8FwqtCf8rTZnx04 )

Hi Oleg,

Everyone wants to talk about the challenges of training AI models.

But the real bottleneck may be inference, or an AI model’s ability to process new information.

Every $1 billion spent training an AI model can require up to $20 billion in inference costs.¹

SambaNova (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VVRF_V52lWlkW1sr4rm6bnNPsW5QKV2t5Qc5sZN1qZLsv3pyd0W8wLKSR6lZ3n3W8xBsYq6Gm342W84vklZ9dCkHCW5X56n21SyPC5W3xBhZD7CYjxFVkcmWD1L6rkzW1w96sL1X8lzyW4mLTjR5ScPZbW7lsV5S3HJQ5SW94Tq9K6wGRHzW8rQWmJ7FtphhN5CvrgdhClkLN31Nm4b_vpvVW6VvM024fpSW5W5NcWCr8lBRVKN9hGH5BDrLbYVH-Lgc83wFmGW3zpldH6dcbjKN1KR69rzm2cqW4gMSmf3ryfP8W2vBjKX571lVzV1fqW36yyGrJW25spVW4mvjkWW2H3xQw8PwQFsW1rVFt68R0WpfW5bTD9_27bfqpW8HK9C16MhDQvW8FQWLg8RvfdbW1PxT_c8FwqtCf8rTZnx04 ) is focused on solving that problem, with AI chips and software designed to help enterprises run AI workloads faster and more efficiently.

In fact, the company ’s fifth-gen SN50 chip outperformed NVIDIA’s Blackwell B200 GPUs on internal inference tests, including 5X the maximum speed and over 3X the throughput.²

As demand continues to grow, SambaNova has earned some notable endorsements:

- Est. $2.3B+ valuation from a Series E joined by Intel’s VC arm and Vista Equity Partners.³
- Multi-year deal with Intel to deliver cost-effective AI inference solutions.³
- $1.4B+ raised to date from investors like BlackRock, Google, and SoftBank.³

There’s no guarantee that revenue, funding, or valuation will continue to grow for SambaNova, or that the company will be profitable. See the risk disclosures on the offering page.

With Series Sambanova-QP-1, qualified purchasers can gain exposure to a company building AI infrastructure for what many believe could be the next major phase of AI adoption.

View Opportunity
(https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VVRF_V52lWlkW1sr4rm6bnNPsW5QKV2t5Qc5sZN1qZLsv3pyd0W8wLKSR6lZ3n3W8xBsYq6Gm342W84vklZ9dCkHCW5X56n21SyPC5W3xBhZD7CYjxFVkcmWD1L6rkzW1w96sL1X8lzyW4mLTjR5ScPZbW7lsV5S3HJQ5SW94Tq9K6wGRHzW8rQWmJ7FtphhN5CvrgdhClkLN31Nm4b_vpvVW6VvM024fpSW5W5NcWCr8lBRVKN9hGH5BDrLbYVH-Lgc83wFmGW3zpldH6dcbjKN1KR69rzm2cqW4gMSmf3ryfP8W2vBjKX571lVzV1fqW36yyGrJW25spVW4mvjkWW2H3xQw8PwQFsW1rVFt68R0WpfW5bTD9_27bfqpW8HK9C16MhDQvW8FQWLg8RvfdbW1PxT_c8FwqtCf8rTZnx04 )

Investment is in Series 5-3 (“Series Sambanova-QP-1”), which may hold SambaNova shares directly or thr
